/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llava_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libllava_shared.so -o libllava_shared.so CMakeFiles/llava.dir/llava.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llava.dir/clip.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/joan/Documents/IA/sharing/3rdparty/BitNet-1.58b/build_npu/3rdparty/llama.cpp/src:/home/joan/Documents/IA/sharing/3rdparty/BitNet-1.58b/build_npu/3rdparty/llama.cpp/ggml/src: ../../src/libllama.so ../../ggml/src/libggml.so
